skills.name: Architecture Decision Record Writer
skills.description: Create structured ADRs documenting context, decision, alternatives, and consequences.
skills.promptPreview: Write an ADR for choosing [technology/pattern] over [alternatives]. Include context, decision, consequences, and status.

skills.name: Microservices Decomposer
skills.description: Decompose a monolith into microservices with bounded contexts, APIs, and data ownership.
skills.promptPreview: Decompose [application] into microservices. Define bounded contexts, service APIs, data ownership, and communication patterns.

skills.name: API Schema Designer
skills.description: Design RESTful or GraphQL API schemas with endpoints, types, auth, and error handling.
skills.promptPreview: Design a REST API schema for [domain]. Include endpoints, request/response types, auth strategy, pagination, and error codes.
